designSystem.style: Ocean breeze — clean, fresh, modern with soft pastels, teal/coral/sand palette, rounded cards, smooth micro-interactions, and a community-first visual tone

screens: Home — Personalized feed with eco score banner, nearby items carousel, quick stats (swaps, CO₂ saved, neighbors helped), and recent listings list
Browse — Searchable item discovery with category filter chips, masonry grid of item cards with like toggle, condition badges, and swap preference tags
List — Multi-step listing form (Photos → Details → Exchange → Preview) with category picker, condition selector, and exchange preference field
Community — Chat inbox with unread indicators, per-thread conversation view with quick replies, and community activity feed
Eco Insights — Environmental impact dashboard (CO₂, water, trees), weekly challenge progress ring, sustainability tip cards, and neighborhood leaderboard
Profile — Avatar header with gradient, swap/points/listing stats, achievement badge grid (earned/locked), recent activity timeline, and settings
